details.test: Task 1: Register family team 10:00 AM with cash-on-day payment
Task 2: Sponsor 3rd-ranked team with £25 anonymous one-off donation
Task 3: Buy purple race T-shirts with free registration desk collection
Task 4: Volunteer signup for 2:00–4:00 PM water station shift with T-shirt size L
Task 5: Create viewing plan with two mid-route spots and finish/start area
Task 6: Costume contest entry Under 10 Superheroes at 9:00 AM linked to Rolling Rainbows
Task 7: Race option under £20 starting after 11:00 AM with solo adult registration
Task 8: Check dog policy and submit therapy dog question via contact form
Task 9: £40 split donation (£25 + £15) with processing fee coverage and donor details step
